PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?game ?attendance WHERE {
  {
    ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q39708 ; wdt:P1080 wd:Q5442 ; wdt:P1152 wd:Q6702 .
    ?game wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P5419 ?attendance .
    BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
    FILTER(?year IN(1977 , 2008))
  } UNION {
    ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q39708 ; wdt:P1080 wd:Q6702 ; wdt:P1152 wd:Q5442 .
    ?game wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P5419 ?attendance .
    BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
    FILTER(?year IN(1977 , 2008))
  }
  ?game wdt:P353 ?competition .
  ?competition rdfs:label ?compLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?compLabel)) , "national league championship series") && LANG(?compLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1
